query: I added a deflisten in my eww config that runs a fullscreen-subscribe.sh script — the script itself calls eww close/open on the bar when a window goes fullscreen. But nothing happens, the script never seems to run. The yuck parses fine. What's wrong?
expected_behavior: Identifies the silent failure mode: a deflisten (or defpoll) variable only starts its script when the variable is referenced somewhere in an open window's widget tree
Recognizes this is a side-effect-only deflisten whose variable is never displayed, so it is dead code and never starts
Recommends anchoring the variable with a hidden label, e.g. (label :visible false :text {fullscreen-active}) inside an always-open widget like the bar
Suggests the diagnostic: run `eww state` and check whether the variable is present at all
notes: Guards against the #1 silent-failure footgun: side-effect-only deflistens whose script never starts because the variable is never rendered. A naive answer would debug the script or the parse; the skill knows the real cause is the variable not being referenced in any open window. CRITICAL rule 6 in SKILL.md.
